name: SAP Concur Travel and Expense API
what_it_does: SAP Concur REST API for travel and expense management platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve expense reports, submit and approve expenses, access travel itinerary data, manage receipts, query spending analytics, and integrate Concur T&E data into ERP and finance workflows. SAP Concur is the market-leading corporate travel and expense platform.
use_cases: Retrieving and processing expense reports from finance automation agents
Submitting expense approvals from expense management workflow agents
Accessing travel booking data from corporate travel analytics agents
Integrating Concur T&E data into SAP ERP and accounting workflow agents
not_for: Simple single-user expense tracking without corporate approval workflows
best_when: A company using SAP Concur for corporate travel and expense wants AI agents to automate expense processing, enforce policy compliance, and integrate T&E data into SAP ERP and finance systems.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Expense report manipulation or incorrect approval routing can cause financial fraud or compliance violations. PRIVACY: Employee travel patterns and expense data are personal data.

auth.notes: SAP Concur uses OAuth 2.0 with multiple grant types. Company-level and user-level tokens. Concur developer portal for app registration. Company admin must approve app access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise T&E platform pricing; part of SAP suite
pricing.notes: SAP-owned enterprise platform. Significant enterprise investment. Pricing per seat and feature module.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Expense approval routing errors can bypass controls — verify approval workflow logic
PRIVACY: Employee travel patterns and spending data are personal data
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with company admin approval process
Concur has both v3 and v4 APIs — prefer v4 (newer) but not all resources migrated
Company admin must approve OAuth app before user authentication possible
SAP Concur legacy API documentation can be confusing — prefer v4 reference docs
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK + PRIVACY: Employee T&E data and travel patterns. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. SAP enterprise compliance. EU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee T&E and travel data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. SAP enterprise security. EU data residency.
